[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000111 3
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 10111100 5
5 10000010 2
6 11010010 4
7 00100100 2

01 10 10000000 1
12 21 10000010 2 match 5
23 32 00000000 a match 1 2 3
34 43 00000100 1
45 54 00000101 2
56 65 00000001 1
67 76 00000001 1
70 07 00000100 1

13 31 00000000 a match 1 2 3
24 42 01000000 1
35 53 00100100 2 match 7

57 75 00000111 3 match 0

71 17 00000010 1

47 74 00000101 2

61 16 00000000 a match 1 2 3
72 27 00000010 1

37 73 00000100 1
